summary: Washington State agency contract data for fiscal year 2024, including contractor name, procurement type, contract effective dates, period of performance, cost, and purpose description.
Washington Department of Fish and Wildlife fish plant data, including stock, species, release dates, coded wire tag codes, and counts of marked, tagged, and unmarked fish.
WDFW Salmonid Population Indicators escapement data tracking wild salmonid abundance, including population name, species, production type, escapement methodology, and last updated date.
WDFW Salmonid Population Indicators population data including ESU/DPS name, species, federal status, ESA listing date, recovery plan year, hatchery standards, and stock spawning distribution.
Washington State agency contract data for fiscal year 2023, including contractor name, purpose, cost, state amount, effective dates, period of performance, and amendment number.
Washington State public water system source capacity information for drought planning, including well depth, source name, water system name, maximum total population, WRIA number, and location.
Washington State per pupil expenditure finance report card data by school year, including federal, state, and local per pupil expenditure, district name, school name, and enrollment.
Washington L&I affidavit project details for prevailing wage public works projects, including contractor license, phone, awarding agency name and address, prime contractor name, and affidavit ID.
Washington State hospital financial quarterly aggregate report with patient day counts by payer (Medicare, Medicaid, self-pay, other) for acute care, swing bed, and SNF service categories.
WDFW juvenile wild salmonid abundance data including species, stock numbers, abundance, density, occupied river miles, migration year, and salmon recovery region.
Washington State employee salaries by calendar year from 2010 through 2013, including employee name, job title, agency, and annual salary for each year.
Washington State end-of-course assessment scores by state for 2015, including biology proficiency levels, percent meeting standard, excused absences, exemptions, and no-score counts.
WDFW creel analysis catch data including fish count, coded wire tag code, rearing location, water body, fishery name, species, scale card number, and interview ID.

Washington State agency contract reporting for fiscal year 2022, including minority/woman-owned status, contractor name, state amount, effective dates, period of performance, and agency contract number.
Washington L&I public notes for approved prevailing wage intent filings, including intent ID, project ID, note section text, and date note was entered.
Washington L&I affidavit apprentice-level worker details including hours worked, occupation, program name, hourly wage rate, fringe benefits rate, hours per step, registered state, and county.
Washington State criminal justice data including APS crime counts by type (burglary, manslaughter, murder, sex crimes) and juvenile referral rates by offense category.
Washington State MSP/HSPE assessment scores by district for 2011, including math, reading, science, and writing proficiency levels, percent meeting standard, and WAAS data.
WDFW Salmonid Population Indicators recovery goals by population, year, species, goal type, and stock number with last updated date.
Washington OSPI report card student growth data for 2018-2019 by school, including subject, grade level, student group type, ESD, school type, and school year.
Washington L&I counties listed on prevailing wage affidavit filings, linking affidavit ID number and project ID to the county where work was performed.
Washington State end-of-course biology assessment scores by school and subgroup for 2015, including proficiency levels, percent meeting standard, no-score counts, and excused absence counts.
Washington L&I public notes for prevailing wage affidavit filings, including notes text, date entered, affidavit ID, and project ID.
Washington State MSP/HSPE scores by subgroup for 2011, including reading, science, writing, and math proficiency levels, percent meeting standard, and WAAS data statewide.
WDFW creel analysis interview data including target species, angler zip code, state residence, vehicle and trailer count, boat type, guided trip status, and census boat count.

Washington OSPI ELPA21 English language proficiency assessment scores by school for 2016, including emerging and progressing percentages, total tested, student group, grade level, and suppression status.
Washington State Business Licensing Service license list including license name, category, application availability, fees, average issuance time, governing RCWs and WACs, and renewal penalties.
WDFW creel analysis creel event data including water body, project name, start and end time, tie-in indicator, comments, and creation and modification datetimes.
Washington State AYP (Adequate Yearly Progress) data by district for 2014, including district code, name, step, school year, and whether AYP was met.
Washington State IT contracts report for 2022, including contract amounts by fiscal year, cooperative purchase status, IT tower categories, and vendor information.
Washington State CTE Perkins performance data by district and subgroup for 2016, including performance indicator name and number, student numerator and denominator counts, county, and ESD.
WDFW fishing angler effort count data including surveyor number, direct census counts for bank and boat, count quantity, location, and creation and modification datetimes.
Washington State CTE demographic data by district for 2013, including secondary student counts, CTE concentrators, tech prep students, concentrators by subgroup, county, and ESD.
Washington L&I counties listed on prevailing wage intent filings, linking intent ID and project ID to county where work was performed.
WDFW RMIS (Regional Mark Information System) releases data including species, rearing type, sequential numbers, submission date, reporting agency, run, and study integrity.
Washington State eGov platform data showing number of sites by category.

Washington OSPI student course outcomes by outcome type including numerical failing and passing grades, non-numerical passing grades, credits received, and suppressed counts by organization and student group.
Washington State school drinking water lead test results as of April 2019, including school name, lead level in ppb, sample number, program ID, and collection/analysis dates.
Washington State public water system source records with well depth less than 50 feet, including water system ID, max total population, source type, connections, and location.
Washington OSPI report card student growth data for 2017-2018 by school, including subject, grade level, student group, percent low/high/typical growth, and number of students.
Washington Department of Ecology habitat quality data for state-of-salmon assessment, with category comparisons between 2009-2012 and 2013-2018 periods.
Washington OSPI AIM/EOC/MSP/SBA assessment scores by school for 2016 with suppression, including proficiency levels, percent not met, excused absence counts, and suppression reason.
Washington State IT contracts report for 2020, including contract amounts by fiscal year, IT tower categories (platform, output), cooperative purchase status, and other/non-IT designations.
Washington State salmon distribution harvest data by ESU showing percentage by harvest category from state-of-the-salmon assessment.
Hood Canal salmon abundance data including population name, wild spawners, hatchery origin spawners, total spawners, recovery goals, ESA listing year, and WDFW SCoRE ID by year.
Washington OSPI AIM/EOC/MSP/SBA assessment scores by school for 2017 with suppression, including proficiency level counts, percent meeting standard, subject, ESD, and suppression reason.
Puget Sound salmon assessment area summary table for 2018 State of the Salmon, including number of populations, populations with sufficient data, and percent above abundance recovery goals.

Aberdeen Washington flood depth data for insurance premium calculation, including parcel number, address, occupancy type, year built, FIRM zone, LiDAR elevation, ground BFE depth, and number of stories.
WDFW creel analysis gear data including gear ID, interview ID, fishing method (angling method), gear sizes, event date, and fishery name.
Washington OSPI student course outcomes by student, including organization name, school year, student group, grade level, measure, numerator, and suppressed count.
Washington State Office of Financial Management April 1 population estimates by county from 2010 census through 2019, with population change and rank data.
Washington salmon recovery plan progress indicator data by region showing progress scores for select years from 2008 to 2018.
Washington State auditor's report on business licenses, including license name, governing RCW/WAC, application location, fee, renewal frequency, number of uses, and initial applications received.
Washington OSPI AIM assessment scores by district for 2015, including WAAS math, ELA, and science proficiency counts, percent meeting standard, and level breakdowns by district.
Washington State school services provided during school closures survey data by district, week, and topic with summary responses.
Washington State agency Amazon spend data for fiscal year 2023, including agency name, order date, ASIN, item quantity, subtotal, tax, net total, and shipment date.
Washington State agency Amazon spend data for fiscal year 2024, including seller name, item quantity, subtotal, tax, net total, discount program, and pricing discount applied.
Hoquiam Washington flood depth data for insurance premium calculation, including parcel number, address, occupancy type, year built, FIRM zone, LiDAR elevation, BFE, and ground depth.
Washington OSPI report card student growth data for 2016-2017 by school, including subject, student group, school year, district name, ESD name, and percent low/high/typical growth.
Washington OSPI report card student growth data for 2014-2015 by school and district, including subject, student count, percent low/high/typical growth, and number high growth.
Washington OSPI report card student growth data for 2015-2016 by school, including student group, median SGP, district name, county, and percent low/high/typical growth.
Washington State temperature violations per year statewide data for state-of-salmon assessment from 1975 to 2018.
Washington State IT contracts report for 2024 with contract amounts by fiscal year, IT tower categories (data center, network), cooperative purchase status, and DES master contract information.
Washington State WASL (Washington Assessment of Student Learning) scores by state for 2008, including math, reading, science, and writing proficiency levels, percent meeting standard, and WAAS data.
Washington farm pads and evacuation routes data including individual equipment count, equipment value, livestock count, livestock value, total value protected, expenditures, and project phase.
Washington State IT contracts report for 2023 with contract amounts by fiscal year (including FY18-FY29), IT tower categories (output, network), and cooperative purchase status.
Washington State website visits data showing monthly visit counts.
Lower Columbia salmon assessment area summary table for 2018 State of the Salmon, with number of populations, populations with sufficient data, and percent above adult abundance recovery goal.
Washington State agency Amazon spend data for fiscal year 2025, including seller name, brand, item quantity, subtotal, tax, net total, discount program, and order date.
Washington juvenile justice workforce outcomes by demographic group, offense type, and years after graduation, including median hours worked and median earnings.
Upper Columbia salmon assessment area summary table for 2018 State of the Salmon, with number of populations with sufficient data and percent above recovery goal.
Washington State auditor's report on permits, including permit name, category, purpose, governing RCW, business activities requiring permit, total uses, and application location.
Washington OSPI AIM assessment scores by district for 2015 with WAAS science proficiency counts and percentages by level, percent meeting standard, and total tested.
Washington State MSP/HSPE assessment scores by school for 2013, including science, reading, and math proficiency levels, percent meeting standard, and WAAS data.
Washington State dual credit data by district for 2017, including counts for Running Start, AP, CTE, IB, College in High School, tech prep, and at least one option by organization.
Washington WDFW adult salmon abundance population data for 2020 State of the Salmon, including species, ESA unit, recovery plan, federal status, listing date, stock number, and biologist contact.
Washington State MSP/HSPE assessment scores by school for 2014, including science, reading, and writing proficiency levels, building number, and percent meeting standard.
Washington Technology Solutions (WaTech) fiscal year 2016 year-to-date IT spend data by functional group, including IT acquisitions and maintenance/operations totals.
Washington WDFW adult salmon abundance recovery goals for 2020 State of the Salmon, including population name, year, recovery goal, goal type, and stock number.
Snake River salmon assessment area summary table for 2018 State of the Salmon with populations with sufficient data and percent above recovery goal.
Washington State agency contract data for fiscal year 2025, including cost, federal and state amounts, procurement type, contract modifications, and period of performance dates.
Washington State CTE course enrollment by district and cluster area for 2017, including participant and concentrator counts, subgroup, county, ESD, and cluster area name.
Washington State AMAO (Annual Measurable Achievement Objectives) data by school for 2014, including targets met, ELL student levels, proficiency participation rates, and district code.
Washington State demographic information by school for 2014, including race/ethnicity counts and percentages, free/reduced meal eligibility, teacher experience, and student-teacher ratio.
Washington State MSP/HSPE assessment scores by school for 2012, including science, math, and writing proficiency levels, WAAS data, exempted counts, and excused absences.
Washington State WaKIDS (Kindergarten Inventory of Developing Skills) scores by state for 2018, including domains met counts (cognitive, language, literacy, math, social-emotional) by subgroup.
Washington State summer low flow trends from 1975 to 2018, showing evidence of trend and percent of streams measured for state-of-salmon assessment.
Washington State project funding data including project name, primary funding program, legislative district, project number, bills paid, percent paid, CBS funding spent, and active date.
Washington State demographic information by school for 2013, including race/ethnicity counts and percentages, grade span, building number, and total enrollment.

Washington State water/watershed funding finder data for 2017 prototype, including funding program, eligible recipients and projects, grant or loan type, application periods, and administrative organization.

Washington State demographic information by school for 2010, including race/ethnicity percentages, foster care, section 504, migrant, transitional bilingual, teacher experience, and student-teacher ratio.
Washington State CTE demographic data by state for 2016, including secondary student counts, CTE concentrators, tech prep concentrators and students by subgroup and school year.
Washington State dual credit data by district for 2012 (old method), including total dual credit course enrollments by gender and race/ethnicity, and special education counts.
Washington State AMAO data by district for 2011, including ELL student levels, AMAO targets met, percent transitioning, reading and math proficiency participation, and school year.
Washington State WASL assessment scores by school for 2002, including math, reading, science, and writing proficiency levels, percent meeting standard, and WAAS data.
Washington State WASL assessment scores by district for 2004, including math, reading, science, and writing proficiency levels, excused absences, exemptions, and WAAS data.
Washington State MSP/HSPE assessment scores by district for 2010, including math, reading, science, and writing proficiency levels, percent meeting standard, and WAAS data.
Washington WDFW adult salmon abundance escapement data for 2020 State of the Salmon, including abundance quantity, population name, stock number, production type, calculation type, and year.
Washington State WASL assessment scores by district for 2008, including math, science, and writing proficiency levels, no-score counts, and level breakdowns.
Washington State WASL assessment scores by state for 2004, including math, reading, science, and writing proficiency levels, percent meeting standard, and exemption counts.
